name: Silktide
description: Silktide — Accessibility / A11y Testing tool for developers

seo.title: Silktide — Accessibility / A11y Testing
seo.meta_description: Silktide: Silktide — Accessibility / A11y Testing tool for developers

when_to_use: Automated WCAG crawler monitoring 50k-page enterprise site
Accessibility score dashboard tracked across quarterly releases
Policy compliance report generated for public sector website
Content team alerted to new accessibility issues in CMS workflow
Remediation task list prioritized by Silktide severity scoring

pros: Well-designed dashboards and reports out of the box
Clear explanations of a11y issues for non-experts
Covers a11y, content quality, SEO and privacy
Pricing more approachable than enterprise rivals
cons: Depth in any single area trails specialist tools
Automated checks share the usual 40-60% ceiling
Some advanced checks gated to higher tiers
review.verdict: Friendliest dashboards in the category, good for marketing-led teams who want accessibility without a consultant.
review.best_for: Marketing and digital teams wanting approachable multi-site a11y monitoring.
review.not_for: Compliance teams needing deep legal-grade audits.
